commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove -lbnetapi from Makefile
- Update README.md links

- The program doesn't use any network functionality

repository.name: HaiClaude
repository.description: Native Haiku GUI launcher for Claude Code

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): merge coplanar wall faces to prevent stretch artifacts

After Case 3 extrude, gap-filling triangle walls share vertices with
moved corners. Subsequent extrudes move those corners, stretching the
triangles into large sloping faces. Fix: merge coplanar wall faces
into adjacent side faces immediately after creation. The side face
absorbs the triangle into a larger polygon that stretches correctly.

commit.message:
fix: JCross variable references in JSON

Fixed variable references to use stack-based $ syntax.
- Changed $variable_name to push variable then use $
- Ensures proper stack order for multi-parameter calls

JCross syntax requires:
1. 取り出す variable_name (push to stack)
2. Use $ in JSON to reference stack value

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

from disabled thinking. No-think gave better reward (0.3) and
8x faster steps (46s vs 385s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 一键成片模式下跳过重新生成视频确认对话框

问题：在一键成片模式下，当镜头已有视频时，仍然弹出"重新生成视频"确认对话框。

原因：WorkArea 组件内部使用 isBatchGenerateMode 来判断是否处于批量生成模式，
但这个变量只在 autoGenerateAndSubmitSeedance2 函数中设置，与从 props 传递的
isBatchGenerating 没有关联。

解决方案：
- 在"重新生成视频"确认对话框前，同时检查 props.isBatchGenerating 和
  isBatchGenerateMode.value
- 一键成片模式：直接删除现有视频，不弹出确认对话框
- 普通模式：显示确认对话框

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace home screen with 3-step setup flow

Step 1 — Team Names:
  - Two inputs: default "الفريق الأزرق 🔵" / "الفريق الأحمر 🔴"
  - Blue/red focus glow per team row
  - "التالي ←" advances to step 2

Step 2 — Category Selection:
  - Scrollable grid of all categories
  - Counter shows "3 / 6" → "6 / 6 ✅" when complete
  - Cards dim when max reached; selected cards show green checkmark
  - "ابدأ اللعبة 🎮" only activates when exactly 6 chosen
  - Back button returns to step 1 (team names preserved)

Step 3 — Board:
  - Immediately calls startBoard() with teams mode always on

Other:
  - Teams mode is auto-enabled from setup (no toggle needed)
  - "العب مجدداً" and back-from-board both return to step 1
  - Progress pills animate between steps

commit.message:
Add drawArrays validation wrapper with actionable error messages for AI agent

The browser's generic "Vertex buffer is not big enough" GL error gives the AI
no information to diagnose the issue. The wrapper pre-validates buffer sizes
and throws detailed errors (attribute index, buffer size, vertex count, stride,
exact fix suggestion) so the auto-fix agent can reliably correct the script.

commit.message:
Add built-in strategy scanner and keep-alive for Render auto-trading

Strategy scanner (runs as server background thread):
- Scans BTC and ETH every 10 min using EMA-9/21, RSI-14, ATR-14
- Only places trades on strong signals (score >= 4/6)
- Uses same strategy logic as test_trades.py but runs inside the server
- Works on both local dev and Render deployment

Keep-alive self-ping:
- Pings own /api/metrics endpoint every 13 min
- Prevents Render free-tier from sleeping after 15 min inactivity
- Activated by RENDER_EXTERNAL_URL env var (set in render.yaml)

render.yaml: added RENDER_EXTERNAL_URL and SCAN_INTERVAL env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: eliminate crypto waste in replication and preserve EC metadata (#494)

* fix: eliminate crypto waste in replication and preserve EC metadata

Fix 1 — Raw chunk transfer (no crypto overhead):
- Add CAS.ReadChunkRaw/WriteChunkRaw: read/write encrypted+compressed bytes
  directly without decrypt/decompress/compress/encrypt round-trip
- Add Store.ReadChunkRaw/WriteChunkDirectRaw delegating to CAS
- Add S3StoreAdapter.ReadChunkRaw/WriteChunkDirectRaw for replication
- replicateSingleChunk now sends raw bytes (IsRaw=true in payload)
- handleReplicateChunk dispatches to WriteChunkDirectRaw when IsRaw=true;
  fallback path (fetchChunkFromPeers) continues to use WriteChunkDirect

Fix 2 — EC metadata fully replicated (correctness bug):
- Add S3StoreAdapter.GetObjectMetaJSON: returns full s3.ObjectMeta JSON
  (preserves ErasureCoding, ETag, VersionID — all fields stripped by adapter)
- ReplicateObject now uses GetObjectMetaJSON instead of json.Marshal of the
  stripped replication.ObjectMeta
- handleReplicateObjectMeta registers EC shard chunks in chunk registry via
  new registerECShardChunks helper and ChunkRegistryInterface.RegisterShardChunk

Tests:
- CAS: ReadChunkRaw/WriteChunkRaw roundtrip, dedup, concurrent writes
- Adapter: raw chunk roundtrip, GetObjectMetaJSON field preservation
- Replicator: raw read/write path verification, EC shard registry, regression guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: share CAS key across coordinators via auth token derivation

Each coordinator previously generated a random cas.key, so raw encrypted
chunks replicated from coordinator A could not be decrypted by coordinator
B (chacha20poly1305: message authentication failed).

- DeriveMasterKey(token): HKDF(authToken) → deterministic key shared by
  all coordinators in the same mesh (same TUNNELMESH_TOKEN)
- loadOrCreateCASKey: uses token-derived key when authToken is set;
  falls back to file-based random key for standalone/test mode
- ReadChunk self-heals: on MAC failure (wrong-key encrypted chunk),
  deletes the corrupted file and returns "chunk not found" so callers
  can re-fetch from a peer that has the plaintext

Note: existing Docker volumes must be wiped (docker compose down -v)
after this change since chunks written with the old random key are
unreadable once the key changes to the token-derived value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #494 review comments — clarifying comments

- WriteChunkDirectRaw: document that integrity is deferred to read-time
  MAC verification (by design, since data is pre-encrypted)
- registerECShardChunks: document the ordering dependency on
  ImportObjectMeta and the rationale for the rf<1 fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: eliminate negative storage metrics from initCASStats race and self-heal

Two bugs caused storage/dedup metrics to go negative:

1. initCASStats ran in a background goroutine using atomic Store() to set
   the baseline. If concurrent WriteChunk calls raced in before Store()
   completed, their Add() increments were silently overwritten. GC then
   decremented those chunks past zero → negative stats.
   Fix: call initCASStats() synchronously in NewStoreWithCAS before returning.

2. ReadChunk self-heal deleted corrupt chunks (MAC failure) without
   decrementing statsChunkCount/statsChunkBytes, inflating metrics.
   Fix: onSelfHeal callback on CAS notifies Store to decrement stats
   and unregister from the chunk registry.

Tests added:
- TestCAS_SelfHealCallbackInvoked: verifies callback is invoked with
  correct hash and freed bytes when a corrupt chunk is self-healed
- TestStore_StatsNeverNegative: regression guard — write objects, delete
  them, run GC, assert ChunkCount >= 0 and ChunkBytes >= 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review — MAC constant, double-decrement race, token trim

- Extract macFailureMsg constant for chacha20poly1305 MAC failure string,
  making it grep-able and documenting the upstream dependency

- Gate onSelfHeal callback on os.Remove success: if two concurrent
  ReadChunk calls both hit the same corrupt chunk, only the first
  remove succeeds, preventing double-decrement of statsChunkCount
  and statsChunkBytes

- Trim whitespace from token in DeriveMasterKey before hex decode so
  tokens with trailing newlines don't silently produce a different key

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add environment variable support for CORS domains

Add configurable CORS origins via ALLOWED_ORIGINS environment variable.

Changes:
- Update CORS middleware to read ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var
- Support comma-separated list of domains
- Trim whitespace from each origin
- Default to localhost:3000, localhost:8080, localhost:5173 if not set
- Updated .env.example with documentation and examples

Usage:
# Development (default)
ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:8080

# Production
ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://example.com,https://app.example.com

This allows easy configuration for different environments without code changes.

fix: separate Claude and OpenAI model env vars in sparring service

SPAR_MODEL was shared by both callClaude and callOpenAI. If SPAR_MODEL
was set to a GPT model name (e.g. gpt-4-turbo), callClaude would send
it to the Anthropic API causing a 404. Now callClaude checks CLAUDE_MODEL
first, falling back to SPAR_MODEL then 'claude-sonnet-4-6'.

* test: add intake persistence tests for POST /reports (#115)

Add TestIntakePersistence class with 4 tests:
- Verify intake data persists to DB after report creation
- Verify graceful degradation when user row doesn't exist
- Verify warning logged on persistence failure
- Verify intake data retrievable via GET /profile after POST /reports

Also adds implementation plan for intake persistence fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: intake persistence — proper error handling, tests, frontend resilience (#115)

Backend: Replace bare except with specific LookupError handling in POST /reports
intake persistence so errors are logged, not silently swallowed.

Frontend: Assessment page only redirects to intake on 404 (not on 500/network
errors). Intake page logs save failures instead of swallowing them silently.

Tests: Add 4 intake persistence tests covering DB persistence, graceful failure
when user row is missing, warning log verification, and profile retrieval
round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: outcome trends flaky test — chronological sort + microsecond timestamps

The test_trends_declining test failed non-deterministically in CI because:
1. DB returns records in DESC order but trend calculation needs ASC
2. SQLite func.now() has second-level precision — records inserted within
   the same second get identical timestamps, making order non-deterministic

Fix: add explicit chronological sort in both trends and summary endpoints,
and add Python-side microsecond-precision default for recorded_at.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: 优化对话功能速度，将普通话提示改为异步生成

问题：
- AI回答太慢，用户等待时间过长
- 普通话提示生成阻塞了主流程

原因：
- 原代码串行执行：ASR → LLM → LLM(提示) → TTS
- 额外的LLM调用增加1-3秒延迟
- 用户不需要等提示生成完成就能听到AI语音

优化：
- 将普通话提示生成改为异步并行
- 主流程不再等待提示生成完成
- 提示在后台生成，完成后推送
- 减少用户等待时间1-3秒

效果：
- 用户能更快听到AI语音回复
- 提示功能保留但不影响体验
- 异步失败不影响主流程
